impacts.statement: Flooding affects low lying areas including sections of the Orofino business district, the Riverside residential district and U.S. Route 12.
Flooding affects low lying areas ajacent to the river. Floodwaters also approach the airport and homes near the mouth of Orofino Creek.
Flooding affects low lying areas adjacent to the river.
